mapper.update: UPDATE setmeal SET name=#{name},category_id=#{categoryId},price=#{price},image=#{image}, description=#{description},status=#{status},update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0

UPDATE setmeal SET name=#{name},category_id=#{categoryId},price=#{price},image=#{image}, description=#{description},status=#{status},update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE id=#{id} AND version=#{version} AND deleted=0
UPDATE setmeal SET deleted=1,update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM setmeal WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
